generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and grandmother, I've always valued peace—but we can't ignore the reality. Our allies are cutting defense budgets while threats grow. Mandatory service isn't about taking freedoms; it's about ensuring we have the trained personnel to deter aggression. Look at how well it works in Switzerland—stable, prepared, and free. Our children deserve that security. #NationalService #StrongDefense
